LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF KATHLEEN MCLORG NOTICE OF PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO DETERMINE ARBITRABILITY (ON REMAND FROM THE CALIFORNIA COURT OF APPEAL). HEARING HELD, ARGUED, AND THE COURT RULES AS FOLLOWS: SEVERANCE DENIED. THIS MATTER IS NOT SUBJECT TO ARBITRATION. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO STRIKE PARAGRAPH 5 OF AND EXHIBIT C TO DECLARATION OF PAUL W. CANE, JR. RE: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO DETERMINE ARBITRABILITY; PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO STRIKE PARAGRAPHS 3 THRU 9, OF DECLARATION OF JANE LUKE HILL RE: PLAINTIFF MOTION TO DETERMINE ARBITRABILITY; AND PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO STRIKE PARAGRAPHS 3, 5 AND 6 OF AND EXHIBIT A TO DECLARATION OF MELINDA REEVES RE: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO DETERMINE ARBITRABILITY, ARE GRANTED. DEFENDANT'S ORAL REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE RE: ATTORNEY/CLIENT PRIVILEGE AND SUBMISSION OF ADDITIONAL DECLARATION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Notice Of Pltf'S Motion To Determine Arbitrability (On Remand From The California Court Of Appeal);
Off Calendar Sep-08-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF KATHLEEN MCLORG Notice of Plaintiff's Motion to Determine Arbitrability (On Remand from the California Court Of Appeal). Appearances: Dan Crawford, Crawford Law Firm (415) 433-1442, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party; Paul W. Cane, Jr. Esq. of Paul Hastings (415) 856-7085, appearing for Defendant United Services Auto Ass'n, and opposing party. Hearing held, argued, and the Court rules as follows: severance denied. This matter is not subject to arbitration. Plaintiff's motion to strike paragraph 5 of and Exhibit C to Declaration of Paul W. Cane, Jr. re: plaintiff's motion to determine arbitrability; Plaintiff's motion to strike paragraphs 3 thru 9, of declaration of Jane Luke Hill re: plaintiff motion to determine arbitrability; and Plaintiff's motion to strike paragraphs 3, 5 and 6 of and exhibit A to declaration of Melinda Reeves re: plaintiff's Motion to determine arbitrability, are granted. Defendant's Oral request for continuance re: attorney/client privilege and submission of additional declaration is denied. Plaintiff's counsel to prepare Order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
